series_metadata.series_title: Documents Served Upon the Secretary of State
series_metadata.series_description: This record series consists of documents served upon the Secretary of State. Including, but not limited to, initial pleadings, pre-clearances, bankruptcies, subpoenas, summons and complaints or other notice, process or demand and subsequent filings, notice of class action settlements under the Class Action Fairness Act, liquor license hearing notices.
